name: Existing noticeNumber with wrong payeeId → PD_RTP_NOT_DELIVERED
description:
Given an RTP is sent successfully (status SENT) for a given noticeNumber + payeeId,
when the payee queries the delivery-status endpoint with the correct noticeNumber
but a different payeeId,
then the response must be HTTP 200 with status=PD_RTP_NOT_DELIVERED, verifying
that the endpoint filters on both fields.
descriptionHtml:
Given an RTP is sent successfully (status SENT) for a given noticeNumber + payeeId,
when the payee queries the delivery-status endpoint with the correct noticeNumber
but a different payeeId,
then the response must be HTTP 200 with status=PD_RTP_NOT_DELIVERED, verifying
that the endpoint filters on both fields.

labels.name: story
labels.value: Payee checks whether an RTP was delivered

items.statusDetails:
AssertionError: GPD message send failed: 500 {
    "timestamp" : "2026-03-26T07:05:44.296+00:00",
    "path" : "/gpd/message",
    "status" : 500,
    "error" : "Internal Server Error",
    "requestId" : "24c81483-719635"
  }
assert 500 == 200
 +  where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code
